title: Native Binary Ingest And Deterministic Indexing
description: Implement the v0.1 binary ingest path for deterministic ELF fixtures, including artifact registration, sections, symbols, imports, strings, function candidates, xref/call edges, structured diagnostics, and boundary_confidence.
convergence_criteria: rg "boundary_confidence" crates/revdeck-core crates/revdeck-index crates/revdeck-db; rg "CALLS_IMPORT|XREF_FROM|REFERENCES|DERIVED_FROM" crates; rg "source-controlled|sha256|expected" fixtures/manifest.json tests; cargo test -p revdeck-index; revdeck import on corrupt fixture returns structured failure and records failed analysis_run
hints: Read TASK-002.json, E1/E2/E4 analyses, and TASK-001 summary. Extend existing foundation without breaking stable ObjectRef and migrations. Keep Graph/Radar/TUI/export out of scope.
execution_directives: cargo test -p revdeck-index fixture_minimal_elf; cargo test -p revdeck-index fixture_stripped_elf; cargo test -p revdeck-index fixture_sensitive_imports; cargo test -p revdeck-index corrupt_artifact_records_failed_run; cargo test -p revdeck-db reindex_idempotent_indexed_facts; cargo test --workspace
prev_context: TASK-001 completed: Rust workspace, ObjectRef/stable keys, analysis_runs, SQLite foundation tables, repositories, CLI skeleton, fixture manifest, and foundation tests are in place. target/ is ignored via .gitignore.

title: Object Graph Query, Universal Navigation, And Command Pipeline
description: Build the shared ObjectRef query service, local object graph traversal, navigation history, and command parser/resolver/executor separation used by TUI, memory, findings, and export workflows.
convergence_criteria: rg "CommandParser|CommandResolver|CommandExecutor" crates/revdeck-core; rg "navigate_to\\(|back\\(|forward\\(" crates/revdeck-core tests; rg "Ambiguous|Unresolved|UnsupportedInV01|BrokenObject" crates/revdeck-core; cargo test -p revdeck-core command_; integration tests cover String -> Xref -> Function -> Import -> Back
hints: Read TASK-003.json, E1/E3/E4 analyses, and current code after TASK-002 if present. Use ObjectRef APIs, keep parser/resolver/executor separate, and avoid broad query language.
execution_directives: cargo test -p revdeck-core command_parser; cargo test -p revdeck-core command_resolver; cargo test -p revdeck-core command_executor_no_mutation_on_error; cargo test -p revdeck-core navigation_history; cargo test -p revdeck-db object_relation_queries; cargo test --workspace
prev_context: TASK-001 completed. If TASK-002 has run, build navigation/query against its relation kinds and indexed object tables.
